name: Y Combinator S26
notes: Most prestigious accelerator globally. Focus pitch on: India B2B supply chain is a $50B+ market, pre-revenue but MVP live, solo founder is 18 from Tier-3 city (YC loves this story). Apply for S26 and simultaneously mark S26 early decision.
applicationTips: YC loves: clear problem, large market, founder-market fit. Your angle: grew up in Sriganganagar, a trading hub - you SEE this problem firsthand. B2B marketplaces are YC's sweet spot (Meesho, Razorpay started as B2B). Keep answers under 150 words each.
keyStats: Invests $500K for 7%. Demo Day in front of 2,000+ investors. Alumni: Stripe, Airbnb, Dropbox, Razorpay, Meesho.

name: Entrepreneur First (EF) India
notes: Apply by May 1 for 2nd round. EF does NOT require an idea - they invest in YOU as a person. Highlight: technical execution (built full-stack platform solo), domain expertise (B2B supply chain), ambition. They move to San Francisco after 14 weeks.
applicationTips: EF assesses individuals, not ideas. Talk about what makes you exceptional: 18 years old, built a complete B2B platform solo, registered a real company, pursuing dual degrees. Your edge = rare combination of builder + operator at age 18.
keyStats: Up to $250K investment. 14-week program then SF. Backed 3,000+ founders across 30 cohorts.

name: a16z Speedrun SR007
notes: Early applications for SR007 are open NOW (formal window opens April 2026). Apply early - they say early applicants get more attention. $500K for 10% + $500K in follow-on + $5M in cloud credits. 12-week program.
applicationTips: a16z speedrun loves: AI-native companies, marketplace businesses, B2B infrastructure. Hub4Estate hits all three. Emphasize: AI slip scanner, automated inquiry routing, dealer matching algorithm. Technical founder narrative is strong here.
keyStats: $500K + $500K follow-on. $5M+ cloud/AI credits. 12 weeks in SF. 6 cohorts run so far.

name: Antler India
notes: Day-zero investor - you don't need a co-founder. Rolling applications, apply ASAP. 6-week residency + investment phase. 20-45% of founders in each cohort get funded.
applicationTips: Antler invests in individuals. Perfect for solo founders. Talk about your unique insight into B2B supply chain, your execution speed (built full company in months), and your vision for India's industrial supply chain digitization.
keyStats: 30+ locations globally. $200K for ~10%. Day-zero to Series A support.

name: Techstars Anywhere Accelerator
notes: Remote-first program - perfect for India-based founders. September 2026 cohort coming. $20K seed + $100K convertible note for 6%. Access to 10,600+ founders network. Demo Day in front of major VCs.
applicationTips: Techstars looks for: coachable founders, large market, early traction signals. Being remote-first makes this ideal. Emphasize: B2B marketplace model (Techstars loves B2B), India market size, your execution so far.
keyStats: $120K for 6%. 3-month program. 3,600+ alumni. $27B raised by alumni.

name: Google for Startups Accelerator: India
notes: EQUITY-FREE. Program runs June-September 2026. Seed to Series A AI-first startups. You have AI features (slip scanner, inquiry routing). Apply immediately - deadline likely April. Google Cloud credits, mentorship from Googlers, access to Google DeepMind models.
applicationTips: Google wants AI-first companies. Position Hub4Estate as: AI-powered B2B marketplace using computer vision (product photo identification), NLP (slip scanning), and intelligent dealer matching. The AI angle is your key to this program.
keyStats: Equity-free. 3 months. Google Cloud credits + mentorship + Google network access.

name: Surge by Peak XV Partners (Sequoia India)
notes: Sequoia India's early-stage program. Up to $3M funding. 16-week program. Latest investment Feb 26, 2026. Rolling applications - apply now. Backed Meesho, Khatabook, BrowserStack.
applicationTips: Surge loves: India-specific problems with massive TAM, founder-market fit, technology moat. Your story: grew up in the ecosystem, built the product yourself, know the industry deeply. B2B marketplace with network effects = perfect Surge company.
keyStats: Up to $3M. 16 weeks. 250+ companies backed. Sequoia India's seed platform.

name: 100X.VC
notes: India's first iSAFE note-based accelerator. 130+ startups funded. Most active pre-seed in India. Perfect for pre-revenue stage. Rolling applications.
applicationTips: 100X focuses on Indian founders solving Indian problems. B2B supply chain is exactly their sweet spot. Emphasize: large addressable market (₹50,000 crore), the supply chain inefficiency problem, your early execution.
keyStats: iSAFE note (India SAFE equivalent). Up to ₹1Cr. 130+ portfolio companies.

name: Accel Atoms
notes: Accel India's pre-seed program. Just completed AI cohort with Google. Next cohort expected Q3 2026. Watch for applications opening. Accel backed Flipkart, Swiggy, Urban Company.
applicationTips: Accel Atoms focuses on pre-seed India startups. The Google-Accel AI partnership means AI angle is crucial. Position your AI features prominently. Accel loves B2B companies - they backed Bizongo, OfBusiness in supply chain space.
keyStats: Pre-seed program by Accel India (Flipkart, Swiggy investors). Google partnership for AI cohorts.

name: NSRCEL IIM Bangalore
notes: IIM Bangalore's incubator. NO EQUITY taken. Quarterly selections. Women Startup Program available (use for mother as partner angle). Mentorship, IIM network access, DPIIT recognition help.
applicationTips: NSRCEL takes no equity - apply regardless of other applications. The IIM Bangalore brand on your profile is valuable for future fundraising. Apply to both general program AND Women Startup Program (with mother as 51% partner).
keyStats: Zero equity. Quarterly selections. Women Startup Program available. IIM Bangalore network.

name: IIMA Ventures (formerly CIIE.CO)
notes: IIM Ahmedabad's incubator - geographically closest top incubator to Sriganganagar. Supply chain and industrial sector focus. DPIIT-recognized. Strong government scheme connectivity.
applicationTips: IIMA Ventures is geographically perfect for you - Ahmedabad is your nearest major startup hub. Their industrial/manufacturing sector focus aligns perfectly with Hub4Estate. The IIM-A brand + DPIIT recognition is massive for government scheme access.
keyStats: DPIIT recognized. IIM Ahmedabad network. Industrial sector focus. Closest top incubator to you.

name: iStart Rajasthan
notes: PRIORITY #1 after DPIIT. Government of Rajasthan program. Free. Opens doors to ALL state schemes. Rajasthan-based startups get priority. Tier-3 city founder is a POSITIVE differentiator here.
applicationTips: This is your home court advantage. Being from Sriganganagar (Tier-3 city in Rajasthan) is a major positive here. The Rajasthan government actively wants to develop startup ecosystems outside Jaipur. Register here ASAP.
keyStats: Free. Government-backed. Access to all state schemes. Priority for non-Jaipur founders.

name: MassChallenge
notes: World's largest equity-free accelerator. No equity taken. Cash prizes. Multiple regional programs. Apply to MassChallenge India track if available.
applicationTips: Zero equity makes this low-risk. Apply broadly. Supply chain / industrial tech fits their impact mission. The non-dilutive cash prizes are excellent for a bootstrapped early-stage company.
keyStats: Zero equity. Cash prizes up to $100K. Global network. Multiple regional tracks.

name: Plug and Play Tech Center
notes: B2B and enterprise tech focus. Core program is equity-free. Supply Chain vertical program available. Corporate partnerships with large enterprises.
applicationTips: Apply to the Supply Chain or B2B Commerce vertical. Plug and Play connects startups with Fortune 500 corporate partners - for Hub4Estate, this could mean partnerships with major construction companies or electrical manufacturers.
keyStats: Equity-free core program. 40+ corporate partners. Supply chain vertical program.

name: Alchemist Accelerator
notes: Enterprise and B2B software specialists. 6-month flagship program. Top B2B-focused accelerator globally. Helps with complex B2B sales cycles.
applicationTips: Alchemist specializes in enterprise/B2B startups. Hub4Estate's B2B marketplace model is a perfect fit. Emphasize: B2B buyer-seller matching, enterprise dealer network, procurement digitization angle.
keyStats: $30K for 5%. 6-month program. B2B/enterprise specialist. 500+ B2B startups accelerated.

name: Forum Ventures
notes: B2B SaaS focused. $100K check size. Strong GTM expertise for B2B startups. Good for early customer acquisition strategy.
applicationTips: Forum Ventures backs early-stage B2B founders. Position Hub4Estate as B2B marketplace with SaaS elements (dealer subscriptions, analytics). The marketplace + SaaS hybrid model is attractive.
keyStats: $100K pre-seed. B2B focus. GTM-heavy mentorship.

name: Startup Wise Guys
notes: Europe's most experienced B2B accelerator. €100K-€500K available. Strong B2B expertise. Location is Europe but accepts global startups.
applicationTips: Apply if you're open to Europe. They have a strong B2B marketplace track record. Good option if you want European investor network access.
keyStats: €50K-€200K. Europe's top B2B accelerator. Estonian/Latvian base.

name: T-Hub Hyderabad
notes: India's largest innovation hub. Government-backed. Sector-agnostic. Strong corporate connections. Good for getting government traction.
applicationTips: T-Hub's government backing makes it valuable for accessing Central + Telangana state schemes. Their corporate partners include major construction and industrial companies.
keyStats: Largest innovation hub in India. Government-supported. 2,000+ startups.

name: JioGenNext (Reliance)
notes: Reliance's startup program. Access to JioMart, Reliance Retail, and massive distribution network. For Hub4Estate - Reliance's electrical and construction products distribution is DIRECTLY relevant.
applicationTips: The Reliance ecosystem is massive for B2B supply chain. JioMart B2B, Reliance Retail's supplier network, and their construction material distribution could be key partnerships. Pitch as: 'the B2B marketplace that can be Reliance's dealer-tech layer'.
keyStats: Reliance ecosystem access. JioMart B2B integration potential. Massive distribution network.

name: Sequoia Spark (Women-Led)
notes: IMPORTANT: Once your mother is 51% partner, Hub4Estate qualifies as a WOMEN-LED startup. Sequoia Spark is specifically for women founders/co-founders. Apply after LLP amendment. Peak XV (Sequoia India) is the most prestigious VC in India.
applicationTips: After your mother becomes 51% partner, you qualify for Sequoia Spark. This is a massive unlock - Sequoia India's women-focused program with their full investment network. The combination of women-led + B2B supply chain is compelling.
keyStats: Sequoia India's women-centric program. Peak XV network. Capital + community support.

name: NSRCEL Women Startup Program (IIM Bangalore)
notes: IIM Bangalore's dedicated program for women entrepreneurs. Zero equity. After mother becomes 51% partner, apply here specifically. Grant funding available. IIM Bangalore brand adds massive credibility.
applicationTips: Apply here as a women-led startup after LLP amendment. IIM Bangalore's women program has zero equity and provides mentorship, network, and grant access. The credibility from IIM-B brand is invaluable for future fundraising.
keyStats: Zero equity. IIM Bangalore backed. Women-specific grants available.

name: Susa Ventures Fellowship
notes: Susa Ventures VC fellowship. Opens June, closes July 31. Sweet spot: logistics, B2B marketplaces, fintech infrastructure. Monthly stipend. VC network access. Good for building VC relationships.
applicationTips: Susa's B2B marketplace focus is perfect for Hub4Estate. Even as a fellowship (not direct investment), getting into Susa's network gives you warm intros to top-tier VCs. Apply as a founder-fellow.
keyStats: Monthly stipend. B2B marketplace focus. Applications open June-July 31.

name: Contrary Capital
notes: Student/young founder VC. Investment up to $500K. Accepts founders from many universities globally. Works with founders outside US too. Your age (18) is a major positive here.
applicationTips: Contrary specifically targets exceptional young founders. Being 18, solo, and having built a full company is exactly their thesis. Apply as a founder, not fellow.
keyStats: Up to $500K investment. Student/young founder focus. Global applications accepted.

name: Dorm Room Fund
notes: First Round Capital's student fund. Primarily for US university students. Check eligibility - your Mesa School of Business enrollment may qualify you for US-based programs.
applicationTips: Your Mesa School of Business enrollment could qualify you. Worth applying - First Round Capital connection is valuable.
keyStats: First Round Capital backed. Student-run pre-seed fund.

name: DST NIDHI Prayas Grant (Govt of India)
notes: Department of Science & Technology grant. UP TO ₹10 LAKH NON-DILUTIVE. For innovative startups. DPIIT recognition required first. Apply after DPIIT recognition.
applicationTips: Get DPIIT recognition first, then apply here. The ₹10 lakh is non-dilutive (free money). Supply chain digitization fits DST's technology mandate. Strong application angle: AI-powered procurement platform for India's construction industry.
keyStats: Up to ₹10L non-dilutive. Government of India. No equity. Need DPIIT recognition first.

name: Stand-Up India (Women-Led)
notes: REQUIRES MOTHER AS 51% PARTNER. After LLP amendment, apply immediately. ₹10L-₹1Cr collateral-free loan at subsidized rates. Only for women/SC/ST-led businesses. This is your most immediate financial unlock.
applicationTips: Priority action after LLP amendment. Walk into your nearest PSB (SBI, PNB, Bank of Baroda) and ask specifically for the Stand-Up India scheme. Every bank has a Stand-Up India nodal officer. Requires: LLP amendment docs, Udyam registration, DPIIT recognition.
keyStats: ₹10L-₹1Cr. Subsidized rates. Collateral-free. Requires women-led business status.

name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
notes: EQUITY-FREE. Up to $150K Azure credits. LinkedIn Premium, GitHub Enterprise free. Apply immediately - open all year. Quick approval (usually within a week).
applicationTips: Easiest high-value program to get into. Apply today. The $150K in Azure credits alone is worth it. Also gives GitHub Advanced Security, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and OpenAI credits.
keyStats: $150K Azure credits. Equity-free. Quick approval. LinkedIn + GitHub enterprise included.

name: AWS Activate (Portfolio Tier)
notes: EQUITY-FREE. Up to $100K AWS credits. Apply via an accelerator/incubator that is an AWS Activate provider (iStart Rajasthan is one). Quick process.
applicationTips: Apply for AWS Activate Founders tier first (free, $1K credits, immediate). Once accepted to any accelerator/incubator, upgrade to Portfolio tier for $25K-$100K credits. You have AWS CLI installed - you're set up.
keyStats: $100K AWS credits. Equity-free. Upgradeable tiers.

name: Google Cloud for Startups
notes: Up to $200K GCP credits. You already have Google Cloud SDK installed. Apply immediately. If accepted to Google for Startups Accelerator, credits go up to $350K.
applicationTips: You already have Google Cloud SDK set up - you're ahead of most applicants. Apply for the AI/ML track since you have AI features (OCR, NLP). Mention your Anthropic SDK usage too.
keyStats: $200K GCP credits. Equity-free. AI/ML track available. Up to $350K with accelerator.
